'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 117''' is the one hundred seventeenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 24]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - wildlife
*[[3DVO]]
*Weapons and equipment of [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]
